stories.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
stories.summary: Apple has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging the AI company misappropriated trade secrets. The case marks a major escalation in tensions between the two tech giants.

stories.title: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
stories.summary: OpenAI has released GPT-5.6, its newest model family. OpenAI says it is the 'preferred model' for Microsoft Copilot 365, amid ongoing speculation about a potential breakup between the two companies.

stories.title: Meta's new AI chips will begin production in September
stories.summary: Meta announced that its custom AI accelerator chips will enter production in September, reducing its reliance on Nvidia GPUs and marking a major step in its hardware independence strategy.

stories.title: Nvidia, CoreWeave, and Nebius: Inside the Circular Financing of the GPU Boom
stories.summary: An investigation into how Nvidia, CoreWeave, and Nebius are entangled in a web of circular financing that is fueling the GPU infrastructure boom, raising questions about the sustainability of the AI hardware market.

stories.title: Anthropic deploys Claude Sonnet 5, Fable and Mythos restored
stories.summary: Anthropic has launched Claude Sonnet 5 and restored access to its Fable and Mythos frontier models following a federal export control review. Elon Musk publicly praised the Mythos/Fable models.

stories.title: Meta enters the crowded AI coding battle with Muse Spark 1.1
stories.summary: Meta has launched Muse Spark 1.1, its AI coding assistant, entering an increasingly competitive market alongside GitHub Copilot, Cursor, and other AI-powered development tools.

stories.title: What xAI's Grok Build CLI Actually Sends to xAI
stories.summary: A deep technical analysis reveals what data xAI's Grok Build CLI tool actually transmits back to xAI's servers, raising privacy and transparency concerns among developers.

stories.title: Mesh LLM: distributed AI computing on iroh
stories.summary: Iroh introduces Mesh LLM, a framework for running distributed AI inference across decentralized nodes, enabling peer-to-peer LLM computing without centralized cloud infrastructure.

stories.title: AWS GraphRAG deployment cuts drug research cycles by 87%
stories.summary: AWS's GraphRAG technology has been deployed in pharmaceutical research, reportedly reducing drug discovery research cycles by 87%, demonstrating the transformative potential of AI in healthcare.

stories.title: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face's Clem Delangue
stories.summary: Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue argues that open-source AI is more critical than ever as companies increasingly seek to own and control their AI models rather than renting them from cloud providers.
